properties.name: volumePath
properties.description: Full path to the volume in format: catalog.schema.volume

properties.name: filePath
properties.description: Path to the file within the volume (e.g. "folder/file.txt" or "file.txt"). Do not include leading slash.

properties.name: dataFieldName
properties.description: Name of the field from input that contains the binary data to be uploaded

properties.name: directoryPath
properties.description: Path to directory within the volume (e.g. "folder1" or "folder1/subfolder"). Do not include leading slash.

properties.name: directoryPath
properties.description: Path to directory within the volume (e.g. "folder1" or "folder1/subfolder"). Leave empty to list the volume root. Do not include leading slash.

options.name: pageSize
options.description: Number of files to return per page

options.name: pageToken
options.description: Token for the next page of results

options.name: overwrite
options.description: Whether to overwrite an existing file

properties.name: spaceId
properties.description: The ID of the Genie space

properties.name: conversationId
properties.description: The ID of the conversation

properties.name: messageId
properties.description: The ID of the message

properties.name: attachmentId
properties.description: The ID of the message attachment

properties.name: message
properties.description: The message to be sent to Genie Space

properties.name: initialMessage
properties.description: The initial message to start the conversation

properties.name: catalogName
properties.description: The catalog to use

modes.name: string
modes.hint: Enter catalog name or leave empty to list all

properties.name: catalogName
properties.description: Filter by catalog (optional)

modes.name: string
modes.hint: Enter catalog name or leave empty to list all

properties.name: schemaName
properties.description: The schema to use

modes.name: string
modes.hint: Enter schema name or leave empty to list all

properties.name: schemaName
properties.description: Filter by schema (optional, requires catalog)

modes.name: string
modes.hint: Enter full schema name or leave empty to list all

properties.name: fullName
properties.description: The table to access

modes.name: string
modes.hint: Enter full table name in format: catalog.schema.table

properties.errorMessage: Must be in format: catalog.schema.table (e.g., main.default.my_table)

properties.name: fullName
properties.description: The function to access

modes.name: string
modes.hint: Enter full function name in format: catalog.schema.function

properties.errorMessage: Must be in format: catalog.schema.function (e.g., main.default.my_function)

properties.name: volumeName
properties.description: Name of the volume

properties.name: volumeType
properties.description: The type of volume to create

options.name: Managed
options.description: Databricks manages the volume storage

options.name: External
options.description: Volume points to external storage

properties.name: functionName
properties.description: Name of the function to create

properties.name: inputParams
properties.description: Array of input parameters. Each parameter requires name, type_name, and type_text.

properties.name: returnType
properties.description: The return type of the function (e.g., STRING, INT, DOUBLE)

properties.name: routineBody
properties.description: The language of the function body

properties.name: routineDefinition
properties.description: The function body (SQL expression)

properties.name: comment
properties.description: Optional comment or description

options.name: comment
options.description: Optional comment or description for the volume

options.name: storage_location
options.description: External storage location (required for EXTERNAL volumes)

properties.name: tableName
properties.description: Name of the table to create

properties.name: storageLocation
properties.description: External storage root URL for the table. The Create Table API only supports external Delta tables.

options.name: columns
options.description: Array of column definitions. Each column requires name and type_name (e.g. STRING, LONG, DOUBLE, BOOLEAN, DATE, TIMESTAMP).

options.name: comment
options.description: Optional comment or description for the table

properties.name: warehouseId
properties.description: The SQL warehouse to use

properties.errorMessage: Must be a valid warehouse ID

properties.name: query
properties.description: SQL query to execute

properties.name: queryParameters
properties.description: Named parameters for the query. Reference them in your SQL as :name, e.g. WHERE ID = :user_id.

values.name: name
values.description: Parameter name, referenced in the query as :name

values.name: type
values.description: Leave unset to treat the value as a string

properties.name: endpointName
properties.description: The model serving endpoint to query. The input format will be automatically detected from the endpoint schema. The node will fetch the endpoint's OpenAPI schema to determine the correct invocation URL.

properties.errorMessage: Must be a valid endpoint name (alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores only)

modes.name: url
modes.hint: Use the endpoint page URL (/ml/endpoints/), not the /serving-endpoints/ invocation URL.

properties.name: requestBody
properties.placeholder: Request body will be validated against the endpoint schema
properties.description: Request body in JSON format. The node automatically detects the expected format from the endpoint's OpenAPI schema and validates your input at runtime.
properties.hint: See your model serving endpoint for example, request body format.

properties.name: indexName
properties.description: Name of the vector search index

properties.name: endpointName
properties.description: Name of the vector search endpoint

properties.name: primaryKey
properties.description: Primary key column of the index

properties.name: indexType

options.name: Delta Sync
options.description: Automatically syncs with a source Delta Table

options.name: Direct Access
options.description: Supports direct read and write of vectors and metadata

properties.description: Type of vector search index to create

properties.name: deltaSyncIndexSpec
properties.description: Specification for the Delta Sync index

properties.name: directAccessIndexSpec
properties.description: Specification for the Direct Access index

properties.name: queryType

options.name: Text Query
options.description: Query using text (automatically converted to vectors)

options.name: Vector Query
options.description: Query using pre-computed vector embeddings

properties.description: Type of query to perform

properties.name: queryText
properties.description: Text to search for (will be automatically converted to embeddings)

properties.name: queryVector
properties.description: Vector embeddings to search for similar vectors (array of numbers)

properties.name: searchMode

options.name: Hybrid
options.description: Combines semantic (vector) and keyword search for best results

options.name: ANN (Approximate Nearest Neighbor)
options.description: Pure vector similarity search

properties.description: Search algorithm to use

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Comma-separated list of column names to return in results (e.g., "content,URL,title")

properties.name: numResults
properties.description: Maximum number of results to return

properties.name: enableReranking
properties.description: Whether to rerank results using a reranker model for improved relevance

properties.name: rerankerModel
properties.description: Name of the reranker model to use

properties.name: columnsToRerank
properties.description: Comma-separated list of columns to use for reranking (e.g., "content,title")

options.name: filterExpression
options.description: SQL-like filter expression to apply to the results (e.g., "category = 'docs' AND published = true")

options.name: scoreThreshold
options.description: Minimum relevance score threshold for results. Must be ≥ 0 and ≤ 1.
